movie-01.title: Shinchan Movie | Very Very Tasty Tasty | (2013) | Hindi
movie-01.info: The film revolves around the journey of Shin-chan and his mates from the Kasukabe Defense Group as they go on a survival quest to deliver a “Legendary Sauce” at a food festival before an elitist bad guy wipes out all the street food. It is a funny and endearing tale about friendship, cravings, and the eternal clash between A-Class dining (the expensive) and B-Class food (the yummy and cheap).

show-01.title: Kiteresu Season - 1
show-01.info: Kiteretsu seems like a really smart kid who likes to invent stuff. He finds this big collection of plans that his ancestor left behind. The ancestor was called Great Kiteretsu and he was supposed to be brilliant at this kind of thing. The season kind of follows what he does with all of that. It is not totally clear at the start how everything connects.
